requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — ANM Conformity and Tropical Climate Enclosure Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——ANM合格评定及热带气候防护要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——ANM合格評定及熱帶氣候防護要求

summary.en: Benin's national standards and metrology authority is ANM (Agence Nationale de Métrologie), which administers conformity assessment and adopts IEC standards for electrical equipment. For EV charging equipment, the applicable IEC safety baseline is IEC 61851-1:2017 (general requirements for electric vehicle conductive charging systems) and IEC 61851-23:2023 (DC EV charging stations). Project approvals by ARE and SBEE for grid-connected installations will expect IEC-family safety evidence. Benin's tropical climate imposes enclosure and derating requirements that exceed typical China domestic design assumptions: outdoor temperatures regularly reach 35–40 °C in coastal Cotonou and exceed 40 °C in northern regions; relative humidity on the coast is 70–90% year-round; harmattan dust from the Sahara affects northern regions seasonally. Minimum enclosure protection requirements for outdoor EVSE in Benin's conditions should target at least IP55 (dust and water jet protection) for AC units and IP54 or better for DC units, with IK10 mechanical impact protection for publicly accessible equipment. These are higher than typical China domestic AC charger design baselines which may target IP54 only.
summary.zh: 贝宁国家标准和计量机构为ANM（贝宁国家计量局），负责合格评定并对电气设备采用IEC标准。电动汽车充电设备适用的IEC安全基线为IEC 61851-1:2017（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）及IEC 61851-23:2023（直流电动汽车充电站）。ARE和SBEE对并网安装的项目审批将要求IEC体系安全证据。贝宁热带气候对充电桩防护和降额的要求超过中国国内典型设计假设：科托努沿海室外温度通常达35–40°C，北部地区超过40°C；沿海相对湿度全年维持70–90%；哈马丹风季节性将撒哈拉沙尘带入北部地区。贝宁气候条件下室外EVSE的最低防护等级要求应至少达到IP55（防尘防喷水）（交流），直流设备应达IP54或更高，公共可接触设备应具备IK10机械冲击防护。这些要求高于中国国内典型交流充电桩设计基线（可能仅目标IP54）。
summary.zht: 貝寧國家標準和計量機構為ANM（貝寧國家計量局），負責合格評定並對電氣設備採用IEC標準。電動汽車充電設備適用的IEC安全基線為IEC 61851-1:2017（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）及IEC 61851-23:2023（直流電動汽車充電站）。ARE和SBEE對併網安裝的項目審批將要求IEC體系安全證據。貝寧熱帶氣候對充電樁防護和降額的要求超過中國國內典型設計假設：科托努沿海室外溫度通常達35–40°C，北部地區超過40°C；沿海相對濕度全年維持70–90%；哈馬丹風季節性將撒哈拉沙塵帶入北部地區。貝寧氣候條件下室外EVSE的最低防護等級要求應至少達到IP55（防塵防噴水）（交流），直流設備應達IP54或更高，公共可接觸設備應具備IK10機械衝擊防護。這些要求高於中國國內典型交流充電樁設計基線（可能僅目標IP54）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — minimum IP55 for outdoor AC, IP54 for DC in Benin tropical conditions; IK10 mechanical impact for publicly accessible equipment
ANM (Agence Nationale de Métrologie, Benin) — conformity assessment authority
ARE (Autorité de Régulation de l'Electricité, Benin) — electrical installation regulatory requirements

summary.en: China's comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. China domestic AC outdoor chargers are typically tested to IP54, and DC chargers are typically tested to IP55 under China conditions. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is a useful design-starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports. Critically, China domestic thermal derating is typically certified for 45 °C maximum ambient (some manufacturers) or 40 °C, which may be at or near Benin's upper ambient range; sustained high humidity (>80% RH) typical of coastal Benin may not be within the scope of China domestic certification assumptions.
summary.zh: 中国可比安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。中国国内交流室外充电桩通常按IP54测试，直流充电桩按IP55测试。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代IEC 61851认可测试报告。关键在于，中国国内热降额通常认证至最高环境温度45°C（部分厂商）或40°C，可能接近或达到贝宁环境温度上限；贝宁沿海典型持续高湿度（>80% RH）可能超出中国国内认证假设的范围。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。中國國內交流室外充電樁通常按IP54測試，直流充電樁按IP55測試。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代IEC 61851認可測試報告。關鍵在於，中國國內熱降額通常認證至最高環境溫度45°C（部分廠商）或40°C，可能接近或達到貝寧環境溫度上限；貝寧沿海典型持續高濕度（>80% RH）可能超出中國國內認證假設的範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) an IEC 61851-1 clause-level compliance matrix from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (2) IEC 61851-23 evidence for any DC charging station; (3) IP enclosure certificates confirming at minimum IP55 for outdoor AC and IP54 for DC, tested per IEC 60529, with consideration of whether IP66 is warranted for dust-exposed northern Benin deployments; (4) IK10 impact-protection evidence for publicly sited equipment; (5) thermal derating evidence at sustained 40–42 °C ambient and high-humidity performance data; (6) corrosion resistance documentation for coastal salt-air environments in Cotonou and the Atlantic coast; (7) installation instructions in French (Benin's official language). A GB/T 18487 test report alone is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a full clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) 来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 61851-1逐条合规矩阵；(2) 直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据；(3) IP防护证书，确认室外交流至少IP55、直流至少IP54，按IEC 60529测试，并考虑贝宁北部多尘部署是否需要IP66；(4) 公共安装设备的IK10冲击防护证据；(5) 持续40–42°C环境温度下的热降额证据及高湿度性能数据；(6) 科托努及大西洋沿岸盐雾腐蚀防护文件；(7) 法语版安装说明（贝宁官方语言）。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成完整逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) 來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 61851-1逐條合規矩陣；(2) 直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據；(3) IP防護證書，確認室外交流至少IP55、直流至少IP54，按IEC 60529測試，並考慮貝寧北部多塵部署是否需要IP66；(4) 公共安裝設備的IK10衝擊防護證據；(5) 持續40–42°C環境溫度下的熱降額證據及高濕度性能數據；(6) 科托努及大西洋沿岸鹽霧腐蝕防護文件；(7) 法語版安裝說明（貝寧官方語言）。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成完整逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ANM conformity and ARE / SBEE project approval expect IEC 61851 safety evidence; Benin's tropical, dusty, and humid climate imposes enclosure requirements (minimum IP55 AC outdoor / IP54 DC) that must be documented; French-language documentation required
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Benin without additional accredited testing; China domestic IP and thermal certification assumptions may not cover Benin's full climate envelope

source.publisher: ANM — Agence Nationale de Métrologie, Benin

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Benin-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates at tropical-climate levels (minimum IP55 AC / IP54 DC), thermal derating data for 40–42 °C sustained ambient, humidity and salt-air corrosion evidence for coastal sites, and French-language installation instructions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向贝宁的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、热带气候级别的IP防护认证（至少交流IP55 / 直流IP54）、持续40–42°C环境温度热降额数据、沿海站点湿度和盐雾腐蚀证据，以及法语版安装说明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向貝寧的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、熱帶氣候級別的IP防護認證（至少交流IP55 / 直流IP54）、持續40–42°C環境溫度熱降額數據、沿海站點濕度和鹽霧腐蝕證據，以及法語版安裝說明。
